title: 10 best herbal creams for hypothyroidism
description: Eyebright creams helps with hypothyroidism because they contain Euphrasia officinalis, a herb that has anti-inflammatory properties. The cream can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the thyroid gland, which is often associated with hypothyroidism. By reducing inflammation, eyebright cream may also help improve the function of the thyroid gland, leading to improved metabolism and energy levels.
